content: cap-chatter MVP (Spec 53): factory pattern createCapChatter({db?}) with InMemory fallback. EventHandler factory createChatterAutoLog(service) closes over ChatterService since EventHandlerContext has no services field. GraphQL exposed via buildChatterGraphQLExtension({service}) returning queryFields+types for merge into main schema. record.updated payload uses _old/_new keys (from build-crud-actions.ts), both _old/_new and before/after conventions supported for forward compat. EXCLUDED_SYSTEM_FIELDS filters noise from audit log.
